name: Self Evolve
description: MemRL-style self-evolving retrieval policy over episodic memory.

embedding.provider.label: Embedding Provider
embedding.provider.help: Use OpenAI for semantic embeddings, or hash for local deterministic embeddings.

retrieval.k1.label: Phase-A Top K
retrieval.k1.help: Top-k candidate count after similarity gating.

retrieval.k2.label: Phase-B Top K
retrieval.k2.help: Final selected memory count injected into context.

retrieval.lambda.label: Q Weight
retrieval.lambda.help: Blend ratio between z-normalized similarity and Q-value.

retrieval.delta.label: Similarity Gate
retrieval.delta.help: Minimum cosine similarity for Phase-A candidate admission.

reward.provider.label: Reward Provider
reward.provider.help: Use an LLM judge over user feedback text.

reward.model.label: Reward Model
reward.model.help: Model used to score user feedback when reward provider is OpenAI.

experience.summarizer.label: Experience Summarizer
experience.summarizer.help: Use an LLM summarizer for procedural memory experience text.

experience.model.label: Experience Model
experience.model.help: Model used to summarize hidden reasoning and tool traces into reusable memory.

runtime.observeTurns.label: Observe Turns
runtime.observeTurns.help: First N turns only observe and skip Q-value learning updates.

runtime.minAbsReward.label: Min |Reward|
runtime.minAbsReward.help: Skip learning updates when reward magnitude is too small.

runtime.minRewardConfidence.label: Min Reward Confidence
runtime.minRewardConfidence.help: Skip learning updates when reward confidence is below this threshold.

runtime.learnMode.label: Learning Mode
runtime.learnMode.help: balanced: prefer tool turns and allow very strong no-tool feedback; tools_only: learn only when tools were called; all: learn from every qualified turn.

runtime.noToolMinAbsReward.label: No-Tool Min |Reward|
runtime.noToolMinAbsReward.help: In balanced mode, no-tool turns must reach this reward magnitude to learn.

runtime.noToolMinRewardConfidence.label: No-Tool Min Confidence
runtime.noToolMinRewardConfidence.help: In balanced mode, no-tool turns must reach this confidence to learn.

runtime.newIntentSimilarityThreshold.label: New Intent Similarity Threshold
runtime.newIntentSimilarityThreshold.help: When a new user prompt similarity is lower than this threshold, close the current task and start a new one.

runtime.idleTurnsToClose.label: Idle Turns To Close
runtime.idleTurnsToClose.help: Close waiting tasks after N non-feedback idle turns.

runtime.pendingTtlMs.label: Pending TTL (ms)
runtime.pendingTtlMs.help: Close pending tasks when no update is observed for this duration.

runtime.maxTurnsPerTask.label: Max Turns Per Task
runtime.maxTurnsPerTask.help: Hard cap of turns accumulated into one learnable task.

learning.gamma.label: Discount Factor
learning.gamma.help: Future utility discount for Q update bootstrap term.

memory.maxEntries.label: Max Memories
memory.maxEntries.help: Maximum episodic memory entries persisted for this plugin.
